headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. announces release date for first quarter results: Thursday, May 21st, 2026
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 19, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that it will release its first quarter results on Thursday, May 21st, 2026 before the market opens. Following the release via the wire services, the Company will host a conference call beginning at 10:00 AM Eastern Time, which can be accessed at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be available at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events beginning at 12:00 PM Eastern
